entities.name: Databricks
entities.how_described: 本集主要讨论的公司，以 Spark 起家。本集将其描述为聚焦于数据与 AI 的平台，目前正致力于统一智能体管理框架、统一数据库存储，并坚持开放数据格式，以与 Snowflake 竞争。

entities.name: Snowflake
entities.how_described: 本集将其描述为 Databricks 的核心竞争对手。双方都采用了存储与计算分离的云架构，但 Snowflake 早期坚持专有的封闭格式，试图锁定客户数据，最终在开放数据格式全面胜出的趋势下被迫改变立场。

evidence.quote: I had the same pitches from Snowflake.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: of Snowflake.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

evidence.quote: when exactly as one of the Snowflake full founders actually wrote
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_00

entities.name: Neon
entities.how_described: 本集提到该团队提供了存储与计算分离的无服务器 Postgres 架构，该架构每天能发起 1300 万个数据库，这种能力极大地改变了人们使用数据库的方式，并被大量用于智能体和分支实验。

evidence.quote: One of the first people that told me about compute sandboxing was Nikita from Neon.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: A lot of people think about Neon as serverless Postgres with the separation

evidence.quote: In the Neon architecture and in lake-based architecture,
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_00

entities.name: MosaicML
entities.how_described: 本集提到 Databricks 收购了这家以开源大模型闻名的公司。但 Databricks 后来决定不盲目拼算力做通用大模型，而是将重点转向如何让模型变得有用，例如利用其训练栈来扩展针对特定高并发场景的专用模型。

evidence.quote: Mosaic.

evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: We're going to do in-house model because they had the mosaic models.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: I guess when Mosaic started,
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

evidence.quote: the mosaic stack went to help scale.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

entities.name: Omnigen
entities.how_described: 本集将其描述为 Databricks 推出的开源智能体框架。它旨在提供统一的通用 API、安全的云沙箱运行环境，并通过追踪操作历史和预算花费的「上下文策略」来实现企业级的智能体安全管控。

evidence.quote: Omnigens, your baby.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: We tried to set up Omnigens so you can have a server and have the security set up
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

evidence.quote: but I want to make sure we close up anything on Omnigens.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

entities.name: 智能体 (agent)
entities.how_described: 本集的核心主线概念。被描述为需要稳定的云沙箱来持续运行，且在企业落地时面临巨大的安全与预算管控挑战；同时，如果让智能体能直接查询底层的业务数据库，它的能力会变得十倍强大。

entities.name: 沙箱 (sandbox)
entities.how_described: 本集将其描述为为编程智能体提供安全、持续运行的隔离云环境。嘉宾极力主张需要一个「真正不关机的云沙箱」，以摆脱必须保持本地笔记本在线才能维持任务运行的「编程黑暗时代」。

entities.name: LTAP
entities.how_described: 本集将其描述为旨在解决分析数据实时性、且修正了 HTAP 缺陷的新架构。它不合并查询层，而是统一存储层：利用存储集群空闲的 CPU 将行数据实时转码为列式数据，实现分析端零延迟读取。

evidence.quote: And it seems like you're going towards more of the LTAP and the harness stuff.

entities.name: Dream Engine
entities.how_described: 本集将其描述为 Databricks 正在进行的从头重写数据库查询引擎的项目。为避免重写失败，他们建造了一个工厂，用十年来积累的海量运行追踪数据训练机器学习模型，以此高保真地指导底层算法选型。

evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: Okay, well, and then the other big thing is your dream engine.

evidence.quote: Okay, so and then I wanted to actually build out the sort of Dream Engine vision.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: hey, maybe we'll just call it Reynolds Dream Engine.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_00

entities.name: 开放数据格式 (open data format)
entities.how_described: 本集将其描述为已经全面胜出的不可逆行业共识。从 Parquet 演进到 Delta 和 Iceberg，这种开放策略是拥有 30 年历史的企业 CTO 避免被单一厂商锁定的首要考量，也是 Databricks 押注成功的底座。

evidence.quote: But the open data format have won.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_00

evidence.quote: Like I think now every enterprise wants to put data in open data format.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_00
